name: folio
description: folio Layer 0 META FRAMEWORK — universal architecture spec-writing rules + Claude Code plugin harness. Phase X3 試作実装 (minimal scope = ADR-0003/0007: 1 skill + 5 hook + 6 script + 1 CLI).

spec_path.title: Spec Path
spec_path.description: Relative path (from consumer project root) where folio-managed spec HTML files live. canonical default = architecture/spec/ (folio self-host、 X4-C で scratch/ から物理移植済、 ADR-0023)。

caller_marker_env.title: Caller Marker Env Var Name
caller_marker_env.description: Environment variable name that AI agent must set before editing files under spec_path.

caller_marker_value.title: Caller Marker Expected Value
caller_marker_value.description: Expected value of the caller marker env var. Hook denies edit if env var is unset or differs.

review_model.title: Review LLM Model
review_model.description: LLM model for Phase F specialist review agents. Overridable per consumer project.
